name: stacked-delivery
description: Dependency-safe delivery for stacked pull requests, merge requests, and dependent changes with exact parent-head binding, descendant invalidation, per-node proof, safe landing order, and guarded current-state or prepared-mutation handoff receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Deliver dependent changes without stack drift.
interface.longDescription: A cross-agent, cross-forge workflow for freezing a stacked-change chain, proving every child against the exact current parent head, invalidating descendants after ancestor drift, keeping CI evidence node-local, enforcing safe landing prefixes, and handing off current state or prepared history mutations with guarded receipts.
capabilities: Exact base, parent, source-head, and target-branch stack snapshots
Linear topology, identity, worktree, and writer ownership validation
Transitive descendant invalidation after ancestor changes
Node-local proof freshness bound to current dependency composition
Sequential and feature-probed atomic-prefix landing plans
Prepared history-mutation handoffs with equivalence, attribution, backup, lease, phase-local proof, and exact readback gates
interface.defaultPrompt: Validate this stack of dependent changes, identify stale descendants, and prepare the next safe delivery handoff.
